title: High-access process handle opened to LSASS

rule_origin.reference: queries/retrieval_spec.md (Q1/main-alert analytic); executable form formalised under alert-anchor policy v1.0

scope.description: All events in the configured raw source; no event-level answer selector is applied.

selection.justification: Two equivalent Mimikatz accesses form one sub-second burst; the latest matching row is the declared deterministic representative.

rationale: A known dump-capable process opening a high-access handle to LSASS is a direct credential-access analytic.
